business.name: Flaxley DIY & Plumbing
business.tagline: Everything You Need, Close to Home

sample_reviews.author: Dean T
sample_reviews.text: Great little trade counter — always have what I need in stock and the staff know their stuff. Saves me a trip to the big sheds.

sample_reviews.author: Mohammed R
sample_reviews.text: Good range of plumbing bits at fair prices. Handy location if you're working in Stechford or nearby. Happy to recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Karen B
sample_reviews.text: Popped in for some DIY bits and the staff were really helpful pointing me in the right direction. Friendly local shop, will definitely be back.

brand.usp: Flaxley DIY & Plumbing is Stechford's go-to local supplier for plumbing materials, building essentials, and DIY hardware — serving tradespeople and homeowners with the right products at competitive prices.
brand.hero_headline: Your Local Trade Counter in Stechford
brand.about_paragraph: We're Flaxley DIY & Plumbing, based right here on Flaxley Road in Stechford, Birmingham. We stock a wide range of plumbing supplies, building materials, and DIY essentials to keep tradespeople and home improvers moving. Whether you're a plumber needing fittings fast or a homeowner tackling a weekend project, we've got you covered with helpful, no-nonsense service.
